title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ SITOG ANNEX IN BARANGAY SITOG, MUNICIPALITY OF KATIPUNAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE FROM THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SITOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
108 OG No. 50, 6317 (December 10, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10208, October 18, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ SITOG ANNEX IN BARANGAY SITOG, MUNICIPALITY OF KATIPUNAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE FROM THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SITOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВЂВ“ The Katipunan National High School ГўВЂВ“ Sitog Annex in Barangay Sitog, Municipality of Katipunan, Province of Zamboanga del Norte is hereby separated from the Katipunan National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Sitog National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities. ГўВЂВ“

All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Katipunan National High School ГўВЂВ“ Sitog Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Sitog National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations. ГўВЂВ“

The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВЂВ™s program the operationalization of the Sitog National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВЂВ™s appropriations of the Katipunan National High School ГўВЂВ“ Sitog Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВЂВ“ The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity. ГўВЂВ“

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 5, 2012 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

OCT 18 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
